name: White Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Microwave pecans with butter for 1 1/2 minutes. Stir dry ingredients together in a 10-inch springform pan. Add butter and nuts, then mix well. Press onto bottom and sides.
For filling: Beat cream cheese until light. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Mix in remaining ingredients except berries. Pour into pan. Drop berries on top and push down with fork so batter covers them. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours with a pan of water placed on the bottom rack.
Remove from oven and run knife around edge to loosen from pan. Cool before serving topping: Combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan, stirring until well combined. Add raspberries and water, then cook over medium heat until thick and bubbly. Stir in rum if desired. Pour over cooled cake.
This recipe is by Ann Raisler.
